problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: If Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy is applied to they, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
